## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and new automation initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content refresh complete; shifting to performance updates + new content (9 articles this week, 7-8 weekly thereafter)](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Medium workflow nearly finished; integration pages workflow in progress](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Performance metrics steady but unreliable due to Google update](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [New automation requests: social post creation, content gap discovery, trending content curation](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Workflow Updates

  - [5 refreshed pages delivered last week, completing Sydney's earmarked content](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [9 articles scheduled this week; 7-8 weekly moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Action item database updated](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Image workflow still in progress; engineering addressing text-heavy/technical images](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Medium workflow updates nearly complete (H3 vs H2 formatting issue remaining)](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Integration pages workflow (metatitles update) delayed but expected within next sprint](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Overall sessions slightly dipped; engaged sessions stable](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Conversion events declined slightly but remain at healthy levels](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Headless CMS and ecosystem cohorts dipped in sessions but improved engagement](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Integration pages performing well](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)

### LLM Traffic & Visibility

  - [Slight increase in LLM-referred sessions](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [GPT remains a top referrer](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Strapi showing strong presence across most prompt clusters](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Areas for improvement: security best practices for CMS, database options for content management](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

### Social Post Automation Request

  - [Automated process for creating social posts from published Strapi content (excluding GrowthX content)](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [Platforms: Twitter, LinkedIn (primary), Facebook, Instagram](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [Proposed workflow: content publish trigger → AI-generated post + image → UTM link → save to Google Sheets/direct to HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [Engineering team to assess feasibility and provide ETA](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)

### Content Gap Discovery Automation

  - [Leverage social listening (Reddit, Twitter) and Kappa AI for community questions](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [Automate process to identify potential topics for GrowthX articles](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [Engineering to explore implementation after receiving list of desired sources](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)

### Trending Content Curation Agent

  - [Proposed automated process to create blog posts on trending web dev topics](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Concept: "Top 5 things" style content based on trending discussions](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Need to define sources and trending metrics for effective implementation](https://fathom.video/share/YHCmNxhk8MeDJSE1ng_xrfQ39sYehMCx?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
